title: São Caetano do Sul, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to São Caetano do Sul, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

São Caetano do Sul is a city in SP with a population of 162,703. Brazil’s city with the highest Human Development Index, a wealthy suburb in Greater São Paulo with top-tier services and quality of life.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
